raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija wiꞥſch: Ka-
pehz waja mans Kung̅s fatwu
Kalpu ta? jo ko etmu es darrijs?
un kahds Launums irr manna Rohkā?"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu/ klausi jelle mans
Kung̅s Kehninsch tohs Wahrdes
tawa Kalpa. Ja tas KUNG̅S
tew prett man skubbina/ tad lai
wiꞥſch weenu Ehdamo-Uppuri
ohſch/ bet ja Zilweku Behrni to
darra / tad irr tee nclahdeti
preekſch ta KUNG̅A / tapehz ka
tee mann fchodeen atstumj/ un ne
warru palikt eekſch ta KUNG̅A
eemantojamag Teefas/fazzidami:
Eij/ kalpo fwescheim Deeweem."
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet nu mans Affins pee
Semmes ne krittihs no ta KUNG̅-
GA Preekſchas/ jo tas Israēta
Kehninsch irr iſgahjis weenu
Bluſhu mekleht/ itt ka weena Jr-
be us Kalneem tohp guhſtita."
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls: Es
eſmu grehkojs/ atgreesees mans
Dehls Dahwids/ jo es tew ne
darrischu wairs tanna/ tapehz ka
manns Dwehfela fchodeen irr
dahrga bijuſi tawās Azzis/ ran-
gi/ es eſmu aplam darrijs/ un eſ-
mu tohti trakkojs."
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Dahwids/
un fazzija: Redſ/ ſche irr ta keh-
niza Schtehps/ lai tad weens no"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNG̅S lai
ikweenam makfa pehz tawas Tai-
nibas/ un pehz fawas Peetizz-
bas/ gann tas KUNG̅S bij te-
schodeen manna Rohkā dewis
bet es ne gribbeju fawu Rohkā
lift pee ta KUNG̅A Swaiditu"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "An rangi / itt ka taw-
Dwehfela fchodeen irr augsti tu-
reta eekſch mannahm Azzim / te-
laid manna Dwehfela augsti toh-
turreta eekſch ta KUNG̅A Az-
zim/ un laid wiꞥſch mann ispe-
sti no wiſnahm Behdahm."
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Sauls u-
Dahwidu: Swehtihts eſti ti-
mans Dehls Dahwids/ teechan-
tu to darrifi/un arrt pateefi pahr-
spehſt. Tad gabje Dahwids fa-
wu Zettu / un Sauls atgreeſeh-
us tawu Weetu."
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
